description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow dispatch event has an optional input for force-rebuild. The workflow has two jobs: build and CI. The build job runs on ubuntu-20.04, generates a cache key based on files or a timestamp if force-rebuild is true, caches the lib directory, and runs npm run build if the cache is missed. The CI job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-20.04, macos-11, and windows-2022, depends on the build job, and runs tests after caching the lib directory and installing dependencies.
